title: Senior Manager Market Management USA
description_full:
Your Tasks


Supporting the implementation of specific strategic objectives for the United States
Identifying growth opportunities and supporting market and business planning
Analyzing performance (growth, profitability, costs) and deriving improvement initiatives
Preparing decision‑ready analyses as well as planning and budgeting documents for senior management
Managing strategic projects and ad‑hoc assignments for the Board of Management
Supporting M&A activities, including due diligence and post‑merger integration
Promoting close cooperation between the U.S. entities and the global central functions
Assuming selected governance and oversight responsibilities within the U.S. entities


Your Profile


University degree in business administration, economics, law, or a comparable field
Several years of experience in the financial services sector as well as in primary insurance, ideally in a strategy department environment
Strong financial and analytical skills
Good understanding of U.S. business culture, including decision-making processes, stakeholder management, and collaboration with leadership teams based in the United States
Very good command of English and German (at least C1)
Strategic mindset, high level of initiative, and strong stakeholder management skills


Flexible working hours

Flexitime arrangements and flexible working time models allow for a perfect work-life balance – however it suits you.

Health management

Stay healthy with us: thanks to preventive measures, a wide variety of sports and various partnerships.

Mobile working

Whether from home or on the road – our remote working model (up to 60 % mobile) offers you more freedom and independence.

Further training

We satisfy your thirst for knowledge – for example with further training, subject-specific seminars or work and study programmes.
